full_text:
Xianyu Fu 鮮於輔
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xianyu Fu (鮮於輔)was born in Yuyang. Revolted against Gongsun Zan to avenge Liu Yu, later serving Wei well in the north. Xianyu Fu was affiliated with Liu Yu and the Wei Kingdom.
